about.title: Daniel Cabrera
about.subtitle: Web Developer & Content Creator
about.heading: About Me
about.paragraph: I am a passionate Full-Stack programmer with a solid background in both cybersecurity and software development. My professional journey is driven by a commitment to continuous learning and the ability to adapt to new challenges and technologies. I thrive on building elegant, efficient, and secure web experiences.

page.title: Full-Stack Developer & Cybersecurity Enthusiast
page.bio: As a dedicated Full-Stack developer, I bridge the gap between robust software engineering and stringent cybersecurity principles. With over five years of hands-on experience, I've honed my skills in creating dynamic, scalable web applications, always with a security-first mindset. My professional philosophy is rooted in continuous learning and adaptation, allowing me to tackle complex challenges and embrace new technologies with enthusiasm. I thrive on architecting elegant, efficient, and resilient digital experiences, from the server-side logic to the pixel-perfect user interface.
page.contactDesc: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of an amazing team.

businfy.title: Businfy
businfy.descriptionShort: SaaS platform designed to automate the business registration process in Spain. It provides a simple way to submit forms, upload documents, and verify identity, with a freemium service for business management.
businfy.descriptionLong: Businfy is a comprehensive Software-as-a-Service platform designed to drastically simplify the bureaucratic process of registering a new business in Spain. The platform guides users through a step-by-step process, handling the submission of all necessary forms, secure document uploading, and identity verification. It integrates with government systems to streamline operations. After successful registration, Businfy transitions into a business management tool, offering a freemium tier with features like invoicing, client management, and basic accounting to help new entrepreneurs get started.

bookManager.title: Book Management App
bookManager.descriptionShort: Application developed with Python and Tkinter. It allows users to register, log in, view available books, rent, reserve, and manage books/users (administrator mode).
bookManager.descriptionLong: A complete desktop application developed with Python and the Tkinter GUI library. This project serves as a comprehensive management system for a library, allowing for distinct user roles with different permissions. Standard users can browse the book catalog, check availability, and manage their rentals and reservations. The administrator mode provides full CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) capabilities for both books and user accounts, offering a centralized control panel for library management.

aiPodcast.title: AI Podcast Generator
aiPodcast.descriptionShort: Create and share your AI-generated podcasts with the world.
aiPodcast.descriptionLong: This project leverages cutting-edge AI to generate entire podcast episodes from text scripts. Users can input their content, choose from a variety of AI-generated voices, and the system produces a complete audio file. The platform also includes features for sharing the generated podcasts on social media, making it a complete tool for content creators looking to explore new formats.

resuma.title: Resuma (Startup)
resuma.descriptionShort: AI resume analysis service, featuring job profile creation, intelligent job offer searching, and personalized portfolio creation with a '.resuma.app' subdomain. Currently in Alpha phase.
resuma.descriptionLong: Resuma is an ambitious startup project aimed at revolutionizing the job search process. By leveraging AI, the platform analyzes a user's resume to create a detailed professional profile. It then intelligently scours job boards to find the most relevant offers. A standout feature is the automatic generation of a personalized portfolio website under a '.resuma.app' subdomain, providing users with a professional online presence instantly. The project is currently in its Alpha phase, undergoing active development and testing.

roblox.title: Roblox Experience
roblox.descriptionShort: Multiplayer game experience with plots and pixel art drawing.
roblox.descriptionLong: This project is a multiplayer game experience built on the Roblox platform using Luau (a dialect of Lua) and TypeScript with Rojo for source code management. It features a plot-based system where players can claim a piece of land and build structures. A core feature is a collaborative pixel art drawing system, allowing multiple players to draw on a shared canvas in real-time. The game utilizes Roblox's DataStore for persistent data storage.

phanteum.title: Phanteum Network (Web)
phanteum.descriptionShort: Hytale multiplayer server set in ancient Greece, with modes like KitPVP, SkyWars, HungerGames, and Survival PVP.
phanteum.descriptionLong: Phanteum Network was the web portal for a planned large-scale Hytale multiplayer server. The theme was set in ancient Greece, and the website was designed to be the central hub for the community. It showcased planned game modes like KitPVP, SkyWars, HungerGames, and Survival PVP. The site included forums, leaderboards, and news updates, built with a modern web stack to be fast and responsive.

phanteumShop.title: Shop Phanteum Network (Web)
phanteumShop.descriptionShort: Store for Phanteum Network with passwordless login using the 'In-Game' Hytale user, with the purchasing security of Tebex.io. Allows automatic linking with the community's Discord.
phanteumShop.descriptionLong: This web store was developed for a Phanteum Network Hytale server, featuring a novel passwordless login system that authenticated users based on their in-game username. To ensure secure and reliable transactions, the store integrated with the Tebex.io payment gateway, a leading platform for game server monetization. Additionally, it included a feature for automatically linking a player's store account with their Discord account, fostering community integration.

legal.cookiesLine5: Non-essential cookies are never enabled without explicit accept/customize action.
